title: Fuzzer: Segfault on undeclared in sensitivity list

features.name: undeclared identifier in always block sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with a sensitivity list that references an undeclared identifier
features.snippet: module v; always @c.a begin end endmodule

features.name: dotted path in sensitivity list with undeclared base
features.description: Code should include an always block with a dotted signal path in the sensitivity list where the base signal is undeclared

features.name: invalid label syntax in always block body
features.description: Code should include an always block with an invalid labeled statement using colon syntax that is malformed
